name: Knowledge Economic City Company
summary: Knowledge Economic City develops properties and other land in the economic cities of Saudi Arabia. It undertakes projects, including infrastructure, telecommunications and Internet networks, water and electricity networks, water treatment plants, and other works related to the development of the economic cities. The company also engages in the creation, operation, and management of educational projects; and development of software, scientific research centers, universities, colleges, institutes, and academies. In addition, its activities include marketing and selling real estate properties; buildings and land for development or for ownership of others; and managing housing services, tourist projects, resorts, hotels and furnished apartments, and other activities. The company was founded in 2010 and is based in Medina, the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.
